headline: 4 Best Low-Beta Stocks to Buy Right Away: LQDA, CVX, OXY & VLO
summary: Fragile Iran ceasefire keeps stocks volatile. Low-beta picks LQDA, CVX, OXY and VLO show recent gains and solid volume.

headline: Jim Cramer Puts This Chip Stock In The 'Penalty Box,' Warns Occidental Could 'Go Down A Lot' If War Ends
summary: Cramer put Photronics in the penalty box due to poor results. He praised Woodward and warned against Occidental Petroleum.
